'''Vonce''' was a [[Hapan]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]], and [[Benwick Chell]]'s co-[[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. He was a member of the [[Peace Brigade]]. In [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Neeka Sot]].

{{Char-stub}}
